mapper.select: SELECT a.rview_targr_id , b.user_nm AS rview_targr_nm , a.adpt_rslt_cd , (SELECT comm_cd_nm FROM sy_code_dtl WHERE wrk_tp_cd = 'RP' AND cd_tp_cd = '080' AND comm_cd = a.adpt_rslt_cd) AS adpt_rslt_nm FROM rp_pre_rview_opl_list a LEFT JOIN sy_user_info b ON a.rview_targr_id = b.user_id WHERE a.wrk_mast_id = #{wrk_mast_id} ORDER BY b.user_nm
